question.text: What style of options are exchange-traded interest rate options (IROs) in India?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Exchange-traded interest rate options in India are European style, meaning they can only be exercised on the expiration date. **The Trap:** American style (exercisable any time) is a common wrong answer. Bermudan and Asian styles are not used for exchange-traded IROs in India. **Cross-Exam Context:** This is a specific regulatory fact for NISM Series IV. Equity options in India can be European (index) or American (stock). **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The European style simplifies settlement and pricing. It is standard for interest rate derivatives globally due to the complexity of early exercise on fixed-income instruments.
